productDecision.decision: Treat server/src/engine/flows/meta-arbitration as the executable FLOW-35 implementation source.
basis: docs/sessions/FLOW-35/FLOW-35-CURRENT-STATE.json has stale expected-dir metadata for meta-arbitration-engine.
The repo contains server/src/engine/flows/meta-arbitration services and matching FLOW-35 unit/e2e tests.
Targeted FLOW-35 verification passed against the meta-arbitration implementation.

postFixVerification.command: Push-Location server; npx jest --runInBand --colors=false test/meta-arbitration-engine test/e2e/meta-arbitration src/engine-contracts/__tests__/meta-arbitration-engine-bfa-rules.spec.ts; Pop-Location
Push-Location server; npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json --pretty false; Pop-Location

sourceScan.interpretation: FLOW-35 canonical executable source scan returned zero failure counters.
